title: Vietnam routes pre-trip + house cleanup todos (2022)
html:
Vietnam routes pre-trip + house cleanup todos (2022)

Source: 2022-07-31 Apple Note. Pre-Vietnam itinerary brainstorm (the trip that actually happened) + parallel cleanup-the-house list. Predates the actual Ha Giang experience by ~2 years.

TL;DR

  • Vietnam route shortlist: Ha Giang Bike Tour, Ha Long Bay (Poem Mountain), Hoi An Lanterns, Sapa, Phong Nha caves, Nha Trang city life, Ho Chi Minh military museums / Saigon. Most of these get realized in the 2024-09→11 trip.
  • Vietnam visa task + "begin and complete many CS161B assignments" — same note interleaves international travel logistics with summer CS .
  • Long house-cleanup list: stain dinner table, install final outlet covers, mop floor, clean leather couch — Yahir doing his Grants Pass family-house cleanup at home, suggesting this is a return-from-college-summer project.
  • Stream East / Cracked Streams — coda mention of pirate sports streams; small-but-real time-share with the planning content.
  • Pattern: Yahir's Apple Notes treat international travel + dishes-and-floors + CS homework as one unified context. No separation between life-domains in capture.

Connections

  • vietnam
  • ha giang loop
  • sapa

  • 2024 12 14 departing china — adjacent end-of-Asia trip framing
